nodes.name: Switch: Transcriber (YouTube)
nodes.notes: YouTube path: choose transcriber

parameters.url: ={{ (() => { const url = $("Set: Extract & Detect Source").first().json.url; const match = url.match(new RegExp("(?:v=|youtu.be/)([a-zA-Z0-9_-]{11})")); return "https://youtube-mp36.p.rapidapi.com/dl?id=" + (match ? match[1] : ""); })() }}

nodes.name: RapidAPI: YouTube to MP3
nodes.notes: Gets direct MP3 download URL from YouTube via RapidAPI (500 free req/month)

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ audio_url: $("AssemblyAI: Upload YouTube Audio").first().json.upload_url, speech_models: ["universal-2"] }) }}

nodes.name: Whisper: Transcribe YouTube Audio
nodes.notes: Whisper needs audio file — requires download first for YouTube

nodes.name: FastSaverAPI: Get Download URL
nodes.notes: Extract audio download URL from social media

nodes.name: Download Audio File
nodes.notes: Download the actual audio binary

parameters.content:
## [Video to Text] - Multi-Source Transcription - v1

**Trigger:** Webhook POST `/video-to-text`
**Sources:** YouTube (RapidAPI MP3), Social Media (FastSaverAPI), Google Drive
**Transcribers:** OpenAI Whisper | AssemblyAI | Deepgram Nova-2
**Output:** JSON result POSTed to callback_url

⚠️ **ASYNC API** — n8n runs in queue mode.
Every request returns {"message": "Workflow was started"} immediately.
Results are POSTed to callback_url when done.

### Request Body:
```json
{
  "url": "https://youtube.com/watch?v=xxx",
  "source": "auto",
  "transcriber": "assemblyai",
  "gdrive_file_id": "",
  "callback_url": "https://your-app.com/api/result"
}
```

### Callback Response:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "transcription": "Full text...",
  "source_url": "...",
  "source": "youtube",
  "transcriber": "assemblyai",
  "word_count": 1234,
  "timestamp": "..."
}
```

### API Key
`vtt_33872321dd87e4bd6275578fe674bf9102f7d4c96d4a62ee8ddbc54fc1368561`

## YouTube Path
**RapidAPI youtube-mp36 → AssemblyAI / Deepgram / Whisper**
1. Extract video ID from URL
2. GET https://youtube-mp36.p.rapidapi.com/dl?id={videoId}
3. Returns { link: "https://...mp3" }
4. AssemblyAI: download binary → upload to AAI → poll
5. Deepgram: send MP3 URL directly → sync response
6. Whisper: DISABLED

⚠️ YouTube IPs are blocked from n8n VPS — must use RapidAPI
⚠️ RapidAPI temp URLs are IP-restricted — must download binary before sending to AssemblyAI

### Social Media Path
FastSaverAPI extracts audio from TikTok, Instagram, Facebook, Twitter, etc.
Free tier: 200 points/month, 1 req/sec.

### Google Drive Path
Downloads file from Google Drive, then sends to chosen transcriber.

### AssemblyAI Polling (async)
Submit transcript → Code node 15s delay → Poll status
→ IF completed → continue, else → loop back

⚠️ Uses Code node for delay (NOT Wait node)
Wait node closes webhook connection — Code node does not.

Budget 60-120s per video.

### Output: Callback Only

IF callback_url provided → POST result JSON to callback_url
IF no callback_url → workflow ends silently

Result shape:
{
  success, transcription, source_url,
  source, transcriber, word_count, timestamp
}

No Google Docs — use callback_url in your web app.

nodes.name: Wait: Poll Delay (YouTube)
nodes.notes: Wait 15s before polling AssemblyAI

nodes.name: AssemblyAI: Poll Status (YouTube)
nodes.notes: Check if transcription is complete

nodes.name: IF: YouTube Transcript Complete?
nodes.notes: completed → Format Response, else → loop back

nodes.name: POST: Send Callback
nodes.notes: POST transcription result to caller callback_url

nodes.name: Download: YouTube MP3
nodes.notes: Download MP3 binary from RapidAPI temp URL

nodes.name: AssemblyAI: Upload YouTube Audio
nodes.notes: Upload MP3 binary to AssemblyAI — returns upload_url

nodes.name: Deepgram: Transcribe YouTube URL
nodes.notes: Deepgram Nova-2: transcribe from MP3 URL directly (no upload needed)

nodes.name: Deepgram: Transcribe Audio
nodes.notes: Deepgram Nova-2: transcribe binary audio file

nodes.notes: Extract transcript text from Deepgram response

nodes.name: Set: Format Deepgram (Social)
nodes.notes: Extract transcript text from Deepgram response
